framework.name: Agent Payment Systems as Identity Layer
framework.description: Visa and Mastercard are positioning their agent payment systems (Intelligent Commerce and Agent Pay) not just as transaction mechanisms but as authentication/authorization layers for AI agents. This represents a strategic move to control agent identity in commerce, not just payment processing.
framework.raw_quote: These platforms are really very much the same in what they're kind of offering... intelligent commerce, the Visa agent payment system. The announcement comes with a new package of tools in the form of an API for intelligent commerce.

source.title: Episode 327: AI Gets Credit Cards -  "Intelligent Commerce" & "Agent Pay"
